title: Updates response email
excerpt:
Hello, 
How do I make responses to updates sent by e-mail also recorded on the monday board. Today I can only get them to come to my inbox. 
Tks.

posts.author: Danilo (Danilo Fernandes Christófaro)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Danilo,

Good question! Were you looking to have them recorded as updates as well? If so I wonder if you’ve checked out this automation:
